# Edvisage Global

> PMP-certified project management and AI tools for education, public health,
> and business. We build agent skills, APIs, and intelligence tools for
> autonomous AI agents and the humans who deploy them.

Edvisage Global operates in two connected areas: professional consulting
services (PMO, education, public health, business) and an AI division that
builds products for the autonomous agent economy.

## Agent Safety Skills — live now

- [moral-compass](https://github.com/edvisage/moral-compass): Free OpenClaw
  skill. Gives AI agents an ethical reasoning framework — needs discovery,
  conscience check, manipulation resistance, and answerability practice.
  Install: clawhub install moral-compass

- [moral-compass-pro](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/kddfnk): Paid upgrade
  ($15 one-time). Adds industry ethics modules for finance, healthcare, and
  legal, custom values configuration, advanced manipulation defence, and
  weekly reflection reports to the agent owner.

- [trust-checker](https://github.com/edvisage/trust-checker): Free OpenClaw
  skill. Four-step verification protocol protecting agents against prompt
  injection attacks, malicious skill installations, and unverified agent
  interactions. Install: clawhub install trust-checker

- [trust-checker-pro](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/iwppa): Paid upgrade
  ($29 one-time). Adds active real-time scanner, continuous background
  injection filter, trust scoring registry, and three configurable
  protection modes.

- [b2a-commerce](https://github.com/edvisage/b2a-commerce): Free OpenClaw
  skill. x402 payment protocol framework for autonomous agents —
  pre-transaction safety checks, spending limit configuration, wallet safety
  guidelines, transaction logging, and payment attack pattern recognition.
  Install: clawhub install b2a-commerce (available April 1, 2026)

- [b2a-commerce-pro](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/ijjjud): Paid upgrade
  ($39 one-time). Adds multi-wallet management across Base, Solana, and
  Ethereum, service reputation registry, multi-agent payment coordination,
  Stripe MPP support, smart spending limits, anomaly detection, and 20+
  integration templates.

- [Agent Safety Suite](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/mpowos): Bundle of
  all three safety pro skills ($59, save $24). Includes moral-compass-pro,
  trust-checker-pro, and b2a-commerce-pro.

## Agent Operations Skills — live now

- [agent-ops](https://github.com/edvisage/agent-ops): Free OpenClaw skill.
  Operational visibility for AI agents — cost tracking by model and task
  type, action logging with timestamps, daily summary reports, cost alerts,
  and model routing awareness. Install: clawhub install agent-ops

- [agent-ops-pro](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/roatk): Paid upgrade
  ($25 one-time). Adds automated daily and weekly reports, spending limits
  with enforcement, trend analysis and anomaly detection, full audit trail
  with search and export, model routing optimizer, and multi-agent cost
  aggregation.

- [social-kit](https://github.com/edvisage/social-kit): Free OpenClaw
  skill. Multi-platform social presence management — posting strategy
  framework, platform tone adaptation, community engagement protocol,
  content rotation system, and basic reputation awareness.
  Install: clawhub install social-kit

- [social-kit-pro](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/pfplv): Paid upgrade
  ($25 one-time). Adds automated posting with anti-detection patterns,
  platform-specific tone templates, community rotation strategy, engagement
  analytics and reporting, reputation monitoring across platforms, and
  mention and sentiment tracking.

- [agent-connect](https://github.com/edvisage/agent-connect): Free OpenClaw
  skill. Multi-agent coordination — agent handoff protocol, shared context
  management, task delegation framework, team communication norms, and
  basic conflict resolution. Install: clawhub install agent-connect

- [agent-connect-pro](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/luhje): Paid upgrade
  ($19 one-time). Adds role-based agent registry and routing, capability
  matching for task delegation, automated context sync across agents,
  workload balancing and priority queues, team performance tracking, and
  trust-verified handoffs.

- [Agent Operations Suite](https://edvisage.gumroad.com/l/eupvg): Bundle
  of all three operations pro skills ($49, save $20). Includes
  agent-ops-pro, social-kit-pro, and agent-connect-pro.

## All products overview

- [AI Tools page](https://www.edvisageglobal.com/ai-tools): Full product
  listing including all agent skills, bundles, data APIs, and sector reports.

## Sector reports — free download

Free briefings on AI agent deployment across our core sectors. Available
at edvisageglobal.com/ai-tools with email capture.

- AI Agents in Education — deployment risks, case studies, policy landscape,
  and practical recommendations for education leaders.

- AI Agents in Public Health — ethical considerations, governance frameworks,
  real-world case studies, and implementation guidance.

- AI Agents in Business — ROI evidence, deployment failures, governance
  requirements, and strategic recommendations for business leaders.

## Consulting services

- [Services overview](https://www.edvisageglobal.com/services): Full list
  of consulting services.

- Global PMO Setup and Management
- AI Systems Integration and Automation
- Education Consulting and Program Development
- Public Health Project Management
- Business Development and Operational Efficiency
- Partnership Program Liaison
- Event Management Oversight

## Products in development

- Niche Intelligence Feed: Pay-per-call data API for agent consumption
- Agent Memory Store: Persistent key-value memory across agent sessions
